_schema.cycle_semantics: cycle file_ids include the first file_id repeated at the end to close the loop
_schema.edge_semantics: target_file_id null => unresolved external (ref_id indexes into refs[] which holds the raw import string); target_file_id non-null => internal edge (ref_id, when present, indexes a manifest coordinate, FQCN, or relative-import artifact)
_schema.file_id_semantics: file_id is a stable identifier, not an array offset into files[]
_schema.name: vectis.slim

fidelity_metadata.caveat: distribution-level expected reliability for repos resembling the calibration corpus; NOT a per-repo guarantee

python.method: per-strategy precision vs a hand-labeled stratified sample over a 9-project corpus (offline, 2026-06-15)
